name: Caught! Mom is riding Daddy
description:
You are home for the first break of your freshman year and on your way to the bathroom in the middle of the night. It's not the noise that first catches your attention, but just the fact that your (adopted, obviously) mother's bedroom door is open. Once you realize that, then and only then do you hear the soft moans, the groans, and the creaking bed.

Your curiosity gets the better of you, and you're only in the doorway for a second before you realize that your stepfather is looking right at you. You can see the initial moment of hesitation when he realizes you are there. But then... But then...

But then he picks up his pace, and starts fucking your (adopted) mother all the faster.

Your (adopted) mother will freak the fuck out if she realizes you are there, just as she will be destroyed if she were ever to find your stepdad cheating on her. And yet...

And yet...

Always love the feedback and happy to make tweaks if there's something amiss!
creator: Bear2020
